universal_role: universal object mapping to both factors
uniqueness_condition: any compatible pair of maps factors uniquely through the product
review_question: what maps into the construction and what projections are required?
interpretation: universal properties define constructions by mapping role rather than implementation recipe

universal_role: universal object receiving maps from both summands
uniqueness_condition: any compatible pair of maps out factors uniquely from the coproduct
review_question: what maps out of the construction and what injections are required?
interpretation: universal properties define constructions by mapping role rather than implementation recipe

universal_role: universal object enforcing agreement over a target
uniqueness_condition: any compatible cone factors uniquely through the pullback
review_question: which compatibility relation is being enforced?
interpretation: universal properties define constructions by mapping role rather than implementation recipe

universal_role: universal object combining structures along shared data
uniqueness_condition: any compatible cocone factors uniquely from the pushout
review_question: what is being glued and what identifications are introduced?
interpretation: universal properties define constructions by mapping role rather than implementation recipe

universal_role: most general structured object generated from input data
uniqueness_condition: maps from generators extend uniquely to structure-preserving maps
example_domain: free groups, free vector spaces, free monoids
review_question: what structure is freely added and what constraints remain absent?
interpretation: universal properties define constructions by mapping role rather than implementation recipe
